description:
About the job
Company Description
Mystro is an AI-powered client onboarding platform designed specifically for brokers, offering tools, support, and expertise to streamline processes, boost volumes, and prepare businesses for future growth. It is tailored to meet the needs of organizations looking to attract more customers, enhance client retention, and scale effectively. Mystro is committed to empowering businesses with innovative solutions for efficient client management and long-term success.

Role Description
This is a full-time hybrid Senior Software Engineer role based in Melbourne or Sydney, with an option for remote work. The Senior Software Engineer will design, develop, and maintain high-quality software solutions, focusing on backend web development and programming. Responsibilities include participating in the software development lifecycle, implementing object-oriented programming principles, optimizing application performance, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to meet project objectives.

Qualifications
Strong knowledge of Computer Science fundamentals, including algorithms and data structures
Proven expertise in Back-End Web Development and Software Development
Proficiency in Programming and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts
Ability to write readable, maintainable, and efficient code
Experience in problem-solving and debugging complex software systems
Familiarity with Agile methodologies and team collaboration
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field
Prior experience in AI or FinTech industries is a plus
